text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Another day, another go at<n>becoming an
amazing Umamusume,<n>just like Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Hold up. That little girl...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
O-oh my gosh, she's adorable! Look<n>at her
Umamusume ears and tail!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Huh... Omigosh! Is that...

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: It is! It's Spe! Yippee! Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoa, huh? C-could you be...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: M-my fan?!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I saw you run at the festival the<n>daycare
put on!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The daycare... Oh, yeah! I think I<n>remember going
as part of my<n>volunteer activities!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Hehe! You were so cool back then,<n>Spe.

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: I wanna be just like you when I grow<n>up!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
What?! B-but, um... wasn't I super<n>uncool back
then?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I fell over 'cause I got so nervous. I<n>was totally
covered in mud...

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
So? You got up again, didn't you?<n>And then you
zoooomed ahead super<n>fast!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
It was like magic! You were the<n>coolest one that
day!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
What? B-but I'm not the kind of<n>Umamusume
that should be admired...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
W-wait! Have you heard of Suzuka?<n>Silence
Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: She's the one who got first place thatday. The way she runs is so beautiful,and she's super cool!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: She should get all of your attention...

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Awww, why? I can't run like her...

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: But I can do my best, just like you do,<n>Spe!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
I wanna be someone who doesn't<n>give up, even
if they mess up! Just<n>like you!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Someone like me... who doesn't give<n>up, no
matter what...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm taking a break in the central plaza<n>in
between training sessions when I<n>spot Silence
Suzuka and Special<n>Week.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh. Hello, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: S-Suzuka, listen! Um, so just now...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like a lovely exchange. Your<n>little
friend's eyes must have been<n>sparkling with
happiness.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah, they were! How did you<n>know?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Well, I had a hunch she acted just the<n>way you
do when you talk about me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...I'm sure you gave her something<n>that only
you're capable of.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Something only I can give, huh? I<n>never
would've thought I had<n>anything like that.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe I'm glad you finally realize<n>what makes
you so great.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Um, Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I really do look up to you. I do want to<n>be just
like you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But now, I want to cherish myself<n>just as much!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So instead of copying all of you, I'll<n>take the bits
that I admire most and<n>create an even better
version of me!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That way I can hold onto the parts of<n>me that little
girl admired so much.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Then what will you<n>incorporate first?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I guess I'll start with how<n>calm you are!
It's important to have a<n>level head!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, before I forget... I heard we're<n>having carrot
hamburger steaks for<n>dinner tonight.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: No way, really?! Then I've gotta hurry<n>back and—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ahem, start my evening with a quick<n>shower. I'll
catch you later, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
She's awfully true to herself—quick to<n>explode
with energy over the things<n>that make her
happy...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: And that's what I admire about you,<n>Spe.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Special Week runs off as Silence<n>Suzuka looks
on. Whether it's for<n>dinner or her dreams, she
will never<n>give up.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What?! Oh no, they might run out if I<n>don't hurry!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But wait! I'm all sweaty, so I need to<n>take a
shower first!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Or what if I just head straight there?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
B-but Suzuka wouldn't do something<n>like that...
A-anyway, I've gotta get a<n>move on!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Suzuka! I'm gonna go take a<n>shower!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... She just finished training, yet<n>she's so
full of energy.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Her energy is so infectious. Just<n>being around
her makes me happy.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Special Week charges off, focused on<n>her goal
as always, as Silence<n>Suzuka watches on.
